languages.text: "Благо, я вправе настаивать. Закончим на этом".

traits.locale_text: "Благо, я вправе настаивать. Закончим на этом".

languages.text: "Fortunately, I do have the right to insist. We are done here."
languages.original_text: "Благо, я вправе настаивать. Закончим на этом".

traits.locale_text: "Fortunately, I do have the right to insist. We are done here."
"Fortunately, I do have the right to insist. We are done here."
"Fortunately, I do have the right to insist. We are done here."

languages.text: “所幸我的确有权坚持己见。就说到这儿吧。”
languages.original_text: "Fortunately, I do have the right to insist. We are done here."

traits.locale_text: “所幸我的确有权坚持己见。就说到这儿吧。”

languages.text: «Por suerte, yo sí tengo todo el derecho a insistir. No hay más que hablar».
languages.original_text: "Fortunately, I do have the right to insist. We are done here."

traits.locale_text: «Por suerte, yo sí tengo todo el derecho a insistir. No hay más que hablar».

languages.text: « Heureusement, je suis en droit d'insister. Nous en avons terminé. »
languages.original_text: "Fortunately, I do have the right to insist. We are done here."

traits.locale_text: « Heureusement, je suis en droit d'insister. Nous en avons terminé. »

languages.text: "Glücklicherweise habe ich das Recht, zu insistieren. Wir sind hier fertig."
languages.original_text: "Fortunately, I do have the right to insist. We are done here."

traits.locale_text: "Glücklicherweise habe ich das Recht, zu insistieren. Wir sind hier fertig."

languages.text: "Neyse ki ısrar etme hakkım var. Bu konuşma bitti."
languages.original_text: "Fortunately, I do have the right to insist. We are done here."

traits.locale_text: "Neyse ki ısrar etme hakkım var. Bu konuşma bitti."

languages.text: 「幸いにも、私は主張する権利を持っている。ここでおしまいだ。」
languages.original_text: "Fortunately, I do have the right to insist. We are done here."

traits.locale_text: 「幸いにも、私は主張する権利を持っている。ここでおしまいだ。」
